## Critical Rules (enforce for every change)





## Recurring Errors — Quick Fix Reference



## Key Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `nix/modules/core/options.nix` | All port options — single source of truth |
| `nix/modules/roles/ai-stack.nix` | AI stack NixOS module (env injection) |
| `nix/modules/services/mcp-servers.nix` | MCP server systemd units |
| `ai-stack/mcp-servers/hybrid-coordinator/server.py` | Main coordinator |
| `ai-stack/mcp-servers/shared/tool_audit.py` | Structured audit log |
| `config/service-endpoints.sh` | Canonical service URL definitions |
| `scripts/ai/aq-hints` | Workflow hint CLI |

## Before Committing

```bash
python3 -m py_compile <changed.py>
bash -n <changed.sh>
nix-instantiate --parse <changed.nix>
aq-hints "$(git diff --name-only HEAD)" --format=text
```
